gcast_usage: Reply to the message you want to broadcast, then send /broadcast. Optional flags: -user, -nochat, -copy.

help_menu: рҹҺө рқ—Әрқ—өрқ—®рқҳҒ рқҳ„рқ—јрқҳӮрқ—№рқ—ұ рқҳҶрқ—јрқҳӮ рқ—№рқ—¶рқ—ёрқ—І рқҳҒрқ—ј рқ—ұрқ—ј? Choose a section below.
help_admins: Commands in the рҹӣ  Controls category: /setup вҖ” Checks what the group still needs before music can play. /setup /settings вҖ” Opens this groupвҖҷs playback preferences in private. /settings /pause вҖ” Pauses the current track. /pause /resume вҖ” Continues paused music or a saved queue. /resume /skip вҖ” Moves to the next track. /skip /stop вҖ” Ends playback and clears the queue. /stop /seek вҖ” Moves forward by the chosen number of seconds. /seek <seconds> /seekback вҖ” Moves backward by the chosen number of seconds. /seekback <seconds> /reload вҖ” Refreshes the groupвҖҷs admin list. /reload
help_auth: Commands in the рҹ‘Ө Access category: /auth вҖ” Lets a replied member control playback without making them an admin. reply with /auth /unauth вҖ” Removes playback access from a replied member. reply with /unauth /authlist вҖ” Shows everyone with extra playback access. /authlist
help_blist: Commands in the рҹӣЎ Safety category: /blacklist вҖ” Blocks a user or group from using the bot. /blacklist <user or group ID> /unblacklist вҖ” Restores access for a blocked user or group. /unblacklist <user or group ID>
help_lang: Commands in the рҹҢҗ Language category: /language вҖ” Chooses the language used in this group. /language
help_ping: Commands in the вңЁ Bot category: /start вҖ” Opens the main menu. /start /help вҖ” Shows every command category. /help /ping вҖ” Checks whether the bot is ready. /ping
help_play: Commands in the рҹҺө Music category: /play вҖ” Plays a song or YouTube link in the group call. /play <song or link> or reply with /play /vplay вҖ” Plays a music video in the group call. /vplay <song or link> or reply with /vplay /song вҖ” Downloads a song as Telegram-playable audio with its details preserved. /song <song or link>, reply with /song, or send /song -f вҖ” Places the requested track at the front of the queue. /play -f <song or link>
help_queue: Commands in the рҹ“Ӣ Queue category: /queue вҖ” Shows what is playing and what comes next. /queue /loop вҖ” Repeats the current track the chosen number of times. /loop <count>
help_stats: Commands in the рҹ“Ҡ Insights category: /stats вҖ” Shows bot reach, activity, uptime, and service health. /stats /trending вҖ” Shows the most-played tracks across the bot this month. /trending
help_sudo: Commands in the вҡҷпёҸ Sudo category: /sessions вҖ” Opens the complete assistant account manager. /sessions /addsession вҖ” Adds an assistant with a phone number or session string. /addsession /session вҖ” Shows one assistant and its current state. /session <number> /enablesession вҖ” Brings a saved assistant online. /enablesession <number> /disablesession вҖ” Takes an assistant offline without removing it. /disablesession <number> /restartsession вҖ” Reconnects an assistant cleanly. /restartsession <number> /removesession вҖ” Permanently removes an assistant. /removesession <number> /status вҖ” Shows detailed application and server health. /status /activevc вҖ” Lists groups with active music streams. /activevc /broadcast вҖ” Sends a replied message to the selected audience. reply with /broadcast [options] /logs вҖ” Sends the current application log. /logs /setlog вҖ” Chooses where detailed bot reports are sent. /setlog <group ID> /logger вҖ” Enables or disables detailed reports. /logger <on|off> /config вҖ” Opens safe settings that can change while the bot is running. /config /setconfig вҖ” Changes one safe runtime setting. /setconfig <setting> <value> /resetconfig вҖ” Restores one runtime setting to its default. /resetconfig <setting> /backupdb вҖ” Creates and sends a safe database backup. /backupdb /addsudo вҖ” Gives a replied user sudo access. reply with /addsudo /rmsudo вҖ” Removes sudo access from a replied user. reply with /rmsudo /sudolist вҖ” Shows everyone with sudo access. /sudolist /eval вҖ” Runs a Python expression for owner-level maintenance. /eval <expression> /restart вҖ” Restarts the bot process. /restart
